findings.description: Section s2 consolidates the entire 作成手順 top-level heading from the source, which contains three h3 subsections (概要, 主キークラス(ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext)の作成, Actionの作成) and totals well over 2000 characters of plain text. Per V3 rules, an RST section with ≥ 2000 chars that has h3 subsections should be split into separate knowledge sections. The automated pre-check also flagged this: 'Section count 2 < source headings 3'.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings under 作成手順: 概要 (====), 主キークラス(ExclusiveCtrlSystemAccountContext)の作成 (=====), Actionの作成 (====). Each has substantial content including SQL DDL, full Java class definitions, and three separate Java method code blocks.
